overall_notes: Archive Northern Ireland Ltd has made a meaningful first step in structured climate disclosure, providing quantified Scope 1, 2 and partial Scope 3 emissions for FY2023/24 alongside a board-approved 2050 net zero target. However, the disclosure lacks third-party assurance, interim milestones, a formal transition pathway, and SBTi validation, all of which limit scores across multiple dimensions. Evidence quality is mixed: emissions data is reasonably detailed but governance, verification and science-based target dimensions are underdeveloped.

scores.dimension_name: Net Zero commitment and transition plan
scores.evidence_quote: The Board has approved a target of Net Zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2050. Our baseline year is 2022 and we will publish progress against this target annually.
scores.scoring_rationale: A specific net zero year (2050) is stated with a baseline year and a commitment to annual reporting. However, no interim milestones exist yet and no named decarbonisation pathway is in place, falling short of a credible transition plan required for a score of 3.

scores.evidence_quote: Scope 1 (gas, fleet, refrigerants) 412 [tCO2e]; Scope 2 (electricity, location-based) 286 [tCO2e]; Total Scope 1 & 2 698.
scores.scoring_rationale: Both Scope 1 and Scope 2 (location-based) are quantified in absolute tCO2e for FY2023/24 using the GHG Protocol and UK Government BEIS factors. A score of 3 is not warranted as there is no year-on-year emissions comparison (only an energy consumption comparator) and no third-party assurance. [Second-pass correction: 2→1; reduction_trend=False, both_scope2_types=False]

scores.evidence_quote: Scope 3 (partial — see below) 184 [tCO2e]. We have included business travel and waste generated in operations.
scores.scoring_rationale: At least one Scope 3 figure is quantified (184 tCO2e) covering business travel and waste, meeting the threshold for a score of 2. A score of 3 is not warranted as coverage is explicitly partial, no methodology note is provided, and there is no third-party assurance.

scores.evidence_quote: We have not yet engaged an external assurance provider but will keep this under review as our reporting matures.
scores.scoring_rationale: The document explicitly states that no external assurance provider has been engaged. Internal review by the Finance Director and Audit Committee does not constitute third-party verification, so a score of 0 is assigned.

scores.evidence_quote: We have reviewed the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) framework and intend to seek validation of our targets in due course.
scores.scoring_rationale: SBTi is mentioned as an aspiration with an intention to seek validation, but no commitment letter has been signed and no targets have been submitted. This is an aspiration only, warranting a score of 1.
